command: echo '=== Get latest workflow run logs ===' && RUN_ID=$(curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=1&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['workflow_runs'][0]['id'])" 2>&1) && echo "Run ID: $RUN_ID" && echo '=== Jobs ===' && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/$RUN_ID/jobs" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"Job: {j['name']} - {j['status']}/{j.get('conclusion','pending')}\\nSteps:\") or [print(f\"  [{s['status']}/{s.get('conclusion','-')}] {s['name']}\") for s in j.get('steps',[])] for j in d.get('jobs',[])]" 2>&1 && echo '=== Get logs URL ===' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/$RUN_ID/logs" 2>&1 && echo '' && echo '=== Try direct log download ===' && curl -sL "https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/$RUN_ID/logs" -o /tmp/workflow_logs.zip 2>&1 && unzip -o /tmp/workflow_logs.zip -d /tmp/workflow_logs 2>&1 | head -10 && echo '=== Failed step logs ===' && cat /tmp/workflow_logs/*.txt 2>/dev/null | head -100 || find /tmp/workflow_logs -name '*.txt' -exec head -50 {} \; 2>/dev/null | head -100
